booth_level_agents.title: Booth Level Agents
booth_level_agents.description: List of booth level agents and their details.

assembly_constituency_name.title: Assembly Constituency Name
assembly_constituency_name.description: Name of the Assembly Constituency to which this booth belongs.

booth_number.title: Booth Number
booth_number.description: Booth number/part number of that particular booth. Strictly not the serial number.

polling_station_name.title: Polling Station Name
polling_station_name.description: Full name of the polling station/booth name/part name.

agent_name.title: Agent Name
agent_name.description: Name of the booth level agent. Strictly not the father's name. Do not confuse with the father's name column.If बी.एल.ए. का नाम and पिता का नाम both columns available, you should strictly extract only the बी.एल.ए. का नाम as this is the booth agents name

mobile_number.title: Mobile Number
mobile_number.description: Mobile number/Phone Number/Contact Number of the Booth Level Agent.
